observation: Creator capsule exists, but the evolution loop needs an explicit candidate ledger so agents compare mutations before retaining a winner.
selection_pressure: help a creator turn one capsule into a publishable artifact faster without growing the core package layer

candidates.mutation: Route the existing capsule into a single fixed-canvas poster proof.
candidates.phenotype: HTML poster or PDF proof using existing @dash/measure and @dash/print gates
candidates.risk: May duplicate one-pager work if it does not preserve capsule fields.

candidates.mutation: Add a prompt-DNA adapter contract for image/video model experiments without committing raw generated media.
candidates.phenotype: JSON prompt DNA card plus public-safe preview instructions
candidates.risk: Could stay abstract unless paired with a preview sheet in a later slice.

candidates.mutation: Add a machine-checked candidate ledger so every Darwin slice names observation, population, candidates, fitness, and selected winner before retention.
candidates.phenotype: creator:mutation-check validates this candidate population and blocks dashboard-only evolution work
candidates.risk: A ledger can become bureaucracy if it is not tied to one retained winner.

retention: Retain as an example JSON plus script gate. Do not promote a package primitive yet.
